name: Electrode Beast Anion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>電</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アニオン
desc: If this card is Normal Summoned: You can make this card Level 4, then you can add 1 "Spirit Converter" from your Deck or GY to your hand. You can target 1 other card you control; send both it and this card to the GY, and if you do, draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Electrode Beast Anion" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal Summoned: You can make this card Level 4, then you can add 1 "Spirit Converter" from your Deck or GY to your hand. You can target 1 other card you control; send both it and this card to the GY, and if you do, draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Electrode Beast Anion" once per turn.

action: Sends from your field to your Graveyard
